items.headline: NBA Playoffs Tip-Off as Suns Eliminate Warriors, Kerr's Future Uncertain
items.summary: The highly anticipated 2026 NBA Playoffs officially begin today, April 18th, with four electrifying Game 1 matchups across the league. This comes swiftly after the thrilling conclusion of the Play-In Tournament, where the Phoenix Suns secured the Western Conference's 8th seed by defeating the Golden State Warriors 111-96 in a winner-take-all showdown. Following their elimination, Warriors coach Steve Kerr is reportedly contemplating his future with the franchise.

items.headline: Deni Avdija's Play-In Masterclass Secures 7th Seed for Blazers!
items.summary: In a truly historic performance on April 14th, Israeli star Deni Avdija delivered a monumental 41 points, 12 assists, and 7 rebounds to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-110 Play-In victory over the Phoenix Suns, clinching the Western Conference's 7th seed. Avdija, who earned his first All-Star nod this season averaging 24.2 PPG, 6.9 RPG, and 6.7 APG, showed incredible composure in his postseason debut. The Blazers will now face the San Antonio Spurs in the first round.

items.headline: Suns Dominate Warriors to Claim 8th Seed
items.summary: The Phoenix Suns secured the final Western Conference playoff spot with a commanding victory over the Golden State Warriors in the Play-In Tournament.

items.headline: Jalen Green Ignites Suns Offense
items.statContext: Led Phoenix to Play-In victory over GSW.

items.headline: Avdija's Playoff Debut Masterpiece
items.statContext: Carried Portland to 7th seed in clutch fashion.

items.headline: Goodwin's All-Around Impact
items.statContext: Fueled Suns' Play-In win against the Warriors.

items.headline: Kevin Durant Questionable for Rockets-Lakers Game 1
items.summary: Houston Rockets superstar Kevin Durant is listed as questionable for tonight's Game 1 against the Los Angeles Lakers due to a right knee contusion suffered in practice. His status will be a game-time decision.

items.headline: Raptors' Immanuel Quickley Questionable for Cavaliers Series Opener
items.summary: Toronto Raptors guard Immanuel Quickley is questionable for tonight's Game 1 against the Cleveland Cavaliers, dealing with a mild right hamstring strain.

items.headline: Jarrett Allen Ready for Cavs Playoff Run
items.summary: Cleveland Cavaliers center Jarrett Allen is off the injury report and expected to play in Game 1 against the Toronto Raptors, despite managing lingering knee tendinitis.

items.headline: Donovan Mitchell's Future with Cavaliers Ignites Offseason Speculation
items.summary: Donovan Mitchell's contract situation with the Cleveland Cavaliers is a major talking point. Eligible for an extension this summer, reports suggest the Cavaliers are open to exploring trade scenarios if a long-term agreement cannot be reached.

items.headline: NBA Playoff Saturday Schedule
items.summary:
Four first-round series tip off today, April 18th:
- TOR vs. CLE (Game 1) - 1:00 PM ET
- MIN vs. DEN (Game 1) - 3:30 PM ET
- ATL vs. NYK (Game 1) - 6:00 PM ET
- HOU vs. LAL (Game 1) - 8:30 PM ET
